title: Bee Removal in New Springville, Staten Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in New Springville, Staten Island. Safe, humane bee extraction from homes & businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: New Springville residents dealing with unwanted bee colonies need fast, safe removal services that protect both property and pollinators. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional bee removal throughout New Springville, from the residential streets near the Staten Island Mall to the garden-style apartments along Richmond Avenue. Our experienced technicians safely relocate bee hives while ensuring your family and pets remain protected.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of specialized bee removal experience to New Springville, using humane extraction methods that prioritize both safety and environmental responsibility. Our licensed technicians arrive fully equipped to handle any bee situation, offer same-day service throughout Staten Island, and provide transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: New Springville's mix of single-family homes, townhouse communities, and proximity to green spaces like LaTourette Park creates ideal conditions for bee colonies to establish themselves in attics, wall voids, and outdoor structures. The area's suburban character and mature landscaping around developments like Heartland Village means residents often discover active hives in sheds, eaves, and backyard spaces during warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee removal call in New Springville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal service throughout New Springville and Staten Island. For urgent situations involving aggressive bee activity near entryways or high-traffic areas, we prioritize emergency response to ensure your safety. Most New Springville appointments can be scheduled within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 bee removal service?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes a thorough inspection to locate the hive, safe extraction of the entire colony, removal of honeycomb and debris to prevent future pest attraction, treatment of the affected area, and sealing of entry points to prevent re-infestation. The final price depends on hive size, location accessibility, and structural complexity.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in New Springville?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve bee populations, which are vital pollinators. Our technicians work with local beekeepers to relocate healthy colonies. In cases where relocation isn't feasible due to aggressive Africanized bees or severe structural risks, we use targeted treatments as a last resort while following all NYC environmental guidelines.

faqs.question: Can bees return after removal in New Springville homes?
faqs.answer: Once we've removed the hive and sealed entry points, the likelihood of the same colony returning is extremely low. However, the pheromones left behind can attract new swarms, which is why we thoroughly clean affected areas and remove all honeycomb. We also provide a service warranty and can advise on landscaping modifications to make your New Springville property less attractive to future bee colonies.
